title: Garden Broom Outdoor Heavy Duty with Stainless Steel Handle 2-in-1 Yard Brush 120cm Stiff Hard Bristle Sweeping Brush for Patio Driveway Paths Decking Strong Handle Broom for Leaves & Garden Cleaning
features: HEAVY DUTY GARDEN BROOM OUTDOOR SET 120 cm Height and 12" Broom – This Yard Brush Set is designed for tough outdoor jobs, featuring a Stiff Bristle Sweeping Brush ideal for Patio, Driveway, Paths & Decking. Perfect for fast, efficient sweeping in gardens, commercial areas and landscaping tasks.

STIFF SYNTHETIC HARD BRISTLES FOR TOUGH DEBRIS – The 12” Heavy Duty Synthetic Brush Head delivers powerful cleaning to tackle leaves, dirt, rubbish, snow, moss, mud and debris. A high-performance Outdoor Brush built for all-weather use on block paving, concrete, slabs and lawns.

OUTDOOR BRUSH FOR GARDEN, SCHOOL, FACTORY & WAREHOUSE – Engineered for demanding environments including home gardens, schools, factories, workshops, warehouses and commercial premises. This Hard Bristle Yard Broom offers durable, year-round performance.

STRONG HANDLE + DURABLE HEAVY DUTY DESIGN – Built with a reinforced, ergonomic handle for superior grip and stability. This Durable Long Handle Broom is resistant to bending or breaking, making it perfect for intensive garden cleaning, maintenance and landscaping.

IDEAL FOR PATIOS, DRIVEWAYS & BLOCK PAVING – A Robust Outdoor Hard Brush that effectively clears large outdoor surfaces such as paving slabs, stone, gravel, decking, concrete floors, yards and pathways. The perfect Stiff Outdoor Sweeping Brush for both home, industrial and professional use.
description: Keep your outdoor spaces clean all year round with this Heavy Duty Garden Broom & Yard Brush Set, featuring two adjustable handle sizes (120cm height and 12” wide) to suit any user or cleaning task. Built with stiff synthetic hard bristles, this outdoor sweeping brush is perfect for removing leaves, moss, dirt, mud, dust, stones, snow and general debris from patios, driveways, decking, block paving and concrete surfaces. The durable 10” brush head provides powerful sweeping action, making outdoor maintenance fast and effortless. Designed for home and commercial environments, this yard broom is ideal for gardens, schools, factories, workshops, warehouses, sports facilities and construction sites. The reinforced handle ensures excellent stability and long-lasting durability during heavy-duty cleaning. Whether you’re maintaining a garden, preparing a workspace, or keeping outdoor floors clear, this versatile and robust sweeping brush delivers reliable performance in all seasons.
